blocks.description: Program header comments, LIBNAME definitions for raw, staging, and tgt libraries, OPTIONS for reporting layout, %LET control parameters (report_year, dept_count, dept1-dept4)
%INCLUDE loading shared format catalog and macro utilities from common_formats.sas

Parameterized %MACRO generate_report(region=, period=, output_format=PDF) — uses %IF/%ELSE to select ODS destination (PDF/HTML/listing), creates staging.region_&region via DATA step with performance metric derivation, %DO loop over departments running PROC MEANS and PROC FREQ, PROC SQL cross-department comparison, and conditional ODS close
Region configuration via %LET: region_count=3 and per-region name/format mappings (NORTH/PDF, SOUTH/HTML, WEST/PDF)
Driver loop macro %macro run_region_reports wrapping %DO r=1 %TO &region_count — iterates over configured regions and invokes %generate_report with resolved region and format parameters
Invocation of %run_region_reports to execute batch report generation for all 3 configured regions
Open-code %IF/%ELSE conditional block: checks &syserr for report generation errors and emits appropriate log message
PROC SQL executive summary: cross-region comparison selecting headcount, total_actual, and avg_achievement from raw.enterprise_data grouped by region and department for Q4
PROC FREQ generating company-wide performance distribution cross-tabulation of region by department for Q4
Title reset, LIBNAME CLEAR for raw and staging libraries, and report generation completion log message
